inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net income $13.1M ÷ ~24.1M diluted shares; 27th consecutive profitable quarter; H1 FY2026 EPS $0.23
inputs.book_source: FY2025 shareholders' equity $142.7M ÷ shares (10-K); Q2 FY2026 equity $148.7M
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence uses filing net income per share, not OCF $13.2M (working-capital and related-party note swings). Sky Ranch lot capex is largely reimbursed via Sky Ranch CAB / Rangeview notes over time.

nav_overlay.overlay_rationale: Book understates mineral rights (zero carrying); related-party receivables ~$2.3/sh; water+land on BS at depreciated cost. Overlay is conservative SOTP above book, below full AF monetization.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025: ~13,900 Arkansas mineral acres impaired to zero in fiscal 2020

segments_or_options.label: Arkansas River Valley mineral interests (~13,900 acres)
Sky Ranch undeveloped phases + ECCV 2032 option
segments_or_options.evidence: Lot delivery cadence in land development segment growth; not separate terminal

segments_or_options.label: Sky Ranch CAB / Rangeview reimbursable advances
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: Partial mark on $56M receivable; repayment tied to tax bonds/fees [Assumption]

optionality_gate.notes: Watch on Lawrence IRR; overlay NAV convergence is secondary until human weights synthesis

bear.notes: Housing affordability drag; slower Sky Ranch absorption; O&G water volumes weak

base.notes: Steady lot cadence, tap fees, water deliveries; FY2026 Phase 2D/2E milestones

bull.notes: Industrial water demand + faster Sky Ranch; ECCV option value post-2032

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Minerals at zero; water systems depreciated; receivables economic

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: Sky Ranch phases 2D–2E; 30,602 AF water table 10-K

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Water court claims ongoing, not lump-sum recovery

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Lot sales and tap fees in reported revenue

growth_explanation.mechanism: Sky Ranch finished-lot deliveries and water/wastewater tap fees drive revenue; mild winter FY2026 accelerated Phase 2D recognition.

items: Water court Box Elder 1,635 AF settlement outcome
